---
title: "Blog"
subtitle: "Rambles about math, research, and life."
listing:
  contents: blog-posts
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default # Change to 'grid' or 'table' if you prefer
  categories: true
  sort-ui: true
  filter-ui: true
  feed: true
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: true
---

Welcome to my blog! Here I hope to share insights on anything and everything related to my research (and not), including research notes, tutorials, academic reflections, and more. Feel free to explore the posts below.
